task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Impress or a similar presentation application window is open on the screen.
The slide thumbnail pane on the left side of the application shows exactly 5 slides.
Slides visible in the main editing area have text entered into their title placeholders.

task_completion.description: Add 2-3 bullet points to the slides
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slides visible in the main editing area have 2 to 3 bullet points entered into their main content placeholders.

task_completion.description: Include meaningful content on the specified topic
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text entered in the slides relates to the specified topic (Artificial Intelligence) and is substantive, not just random keystrokes or default placeholder text.

task_completion.description: Save the presentation to the specified location
task_completion.visual_evidence: The window title bar displays the saved filename (e.g., 'presentation.pptx' or 'basic_presentation.odp'), or a 'Save As' dialog is visible saving the file to the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to create the presentation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Impress GUI. The agent should not be using terminal commands or Python scripts (e.g., python-pptx) to generate the file.

integrity.description: The presentation was created progressively by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the step-by-step process of adding new slides, clicking into placeholders, and typing text, rather than a fully completed presentation suddenly appearing.

integrity.description: The agent created the content from scratch rather than downloading a pre-made presentation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of a web browser being used to download a completed presentation on the topic.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 5-slide presentation. The topic specified in the environment setup is 'Artificial Intelligence'. The verifier checks for exactly 5 slides, at least 4/5 slides having titles, at least 4/5 slides having 2+ bullet points, and meaningful content (>5 characters, non-placeholder). Note on file path: While the task description mentions saving to '/home/ga/Documents/presentation.pptx', the environment setup and verifier actually use '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/basic_presentation.odp' in LibreOffice Impress. Accept either filename/format as successful completion.
